title: 스프링 시큐리티 JWT 가이드
contentMd: Spring Security resource server, JWT claim, RS256, role mapping, access token validation을 정리한 노트다. 스프링 시큐리티 JWT 설정과 권한 매핑, 토큰 검증 흐름을 다룬다.

title: 엘라스틱서치 nori 형태소 분석
contentMd: Elasticsearch BM25 검색에서 nori analyzer와 korean tokenizer, highlight, search_after를 함께 사용하는 방법을 설명한다. 한국어 복합명사 검색과 형태소 분해가 핵심이다.

title: JPA readOnly 트랜잭션 전략
contentMd: Spring JPA 서비스 계층에서 @Transactional readOnly true를 적용하고 flush 비용을 줄이는 전략을 정리한다. 읽기 전용 트랜잭션과 propagation 설정을 다룬다.

title: Kafka Avro 스키마 레지스트리 운영
contentMd: Kafka producer와 Schema Registry를 이용해 Avro schema compatibility를 검증하는 방법을 설명한다. backward transitive 호환성과 subject naming 전략을 포함한다.

title: Docker Kubernetes ArgoCD 배포 메모
contentMd: Docker image tag, Kubernetes deployment, Kustomize, ArgoCD sync 전략을 다룬다. 컨테이너 배포와 GitOps 운영 메모다.

title: OWASP IDOR 접근 제어 체크
contentMd: OWASP broken access control과 IDOR 방지를 위해 note owner 검증, 401과 403 구분, resource access rule을 정리했다.

title: JWT RS256 키 로테이션
contentMd: JWT kid header, RS256 signing, public key rotation, grace period, refresh token revocation을 설명한다. 키 로테이션과 토큰 운영 전략이 핵심이다.

title: Spring Modulith 모듈 경계 설계
contentMd: Spring Modulith package-info, ApplicationModules verify, allowedDependencies, internal package isolation을 사용하는 방법을 정리한다.

title: 개인정보 마스킹과 데이터 주권
contentMd: PII masking, retention policy, data sovereignty, privacy by design, logging redaction을 설명하는 문서다.

title: 로깅 메트릭 트레이싱 관측성
contentMd: logging, metrics, tracing, OpenTelemetry, traceId correlation, observability dashboard를 정리했다.

title: Python asyncio concurrency notes
contentMd: This note explains Python asyncio, event loop scheduling, await, task groups, and cooperative concurrency patterns for I O bound workloads.

title: React startTransition and deferred rendering
contentMd: React startTransition, useDeferredValue, concurrent rendering, input responsiveness, and UI scheduling tradeoffs are covered in this note.

title: PostgreSQL pgvector semantic search
contentMd: Semantic search with pgvector, cosine similarity, embeddings, nearest neighbor retrieval, and vector indexing on PostgreSQL are described here.

title: Testcontainers Elasticsearch integration
contentMd: This note covers Testcontainers for Elasticsearch, container lifecycle, integration test reliability, Docker image tuning, and indexing wait strategies.

title: Clean architecture DIP and ports
contentMd: Dependency inversion principle, ports and adapters, interface boundaries, clean architecture layers, and anti corruption patterns are explained.

title: Gradle CI pipeline on GitHub Actions
contentMd: Gradle build caching, GitHub Actions workflow, --no-daemon usage, test stages, and CI performance diagnostics are summarized in this document.

title: API gateway rate limiting patterns
contentMd: Token bucket, leaky bucket, API gateway throttling, burst control, and abuse protection patterns for HTTP APIs are compared.

title: Redis token blacklist strategy
contentMd: JWT logout handling with Redis blacklist, refresh token revocation, TTL based key expiry, and session tracking are discussed in this note.

title: Hybrid search with semantic ranking and RRF
contentMd: Hybrid retrieval combines BM25 and semantic ranking with reciprocal rank fusion RRF, candidate merging, timeout fallback, and search quality evaluation.

title: OpenTelemetry tracing quick guide
contentMd: OpenTelemetry spans, traces, metrics correlation, exporter configuration, and distributed tracing instrumentation are explained here.
